app.title: UNMAPPED
app.subtitle: Shyira ubumenyi bwawe mu bikorwa
onboarding.step1.title: Ni iki ukorera igihe kinini cy'akazi kawe?
onboarding.step1.hint: Tekereza ku munsi wawe wa buri gihe — ni iki gifata igihe kinini?
onboarding.step2.title: Ni ikihe cyiciro cy'amashuri kirenga wagezeho?
onboarding.step2.hint: Shyiramo amashuri yose y'imvugo, ndetse n'utarangije.
onboarding.step3.title: Waba wigishije ubwe ubumenyi ubwo ari bwo bwose?
onboarding.step3.hint: Kwiga wenyine bibarwa — YouTube, gukorana, kureba abandi.
onboarding.step4.title: Ni imyaka ingahe ukoze akazi kawe ka ngombwa?
onboarding.step5.title: Ni iki cyingenzi ushaka kugeraho?
results.title: Umwirondoro w'Ubumenyi Bwawe
results.subtitle: Duhereye ku ibisubizo byawe, dore uburyo ubumenyi bwawe bugaragaza amahirwe.
results.ai_gauge.title: Ubwiteguye bwa AI
results.ai_gauge.description: Uburebure aho akazi kawe gashobora guhindurwa na mashini mu myaka icumi izaza.
results.tasks.title: Uburyo Akazi Kawe Gasabanywa
results.tasks.description: Imirimo isanzwe uretse isanzwe, akazi k'intoki n'ak'ubwenge.
results.pathways.title: Aho Ushobora Kujya Ikurikira
results.pathways.description: Imirimo ubumenyi bwawe bukwemereraho kujya muri — cyangwa hafi.
results.demand.title: Ikibazo cy'Ubumenyi Bwawe
results.demand.description: Uburyo abakoresha mu karere kawe bashaka abantu b'iby'uzi.
policymaker.title: Inzego z'Akamaro z'Abakozi
policymaker.subtitle: Ingano y'ubunararibonye n'ubwiteguye byateranye mu karere no mu mirimo.
language.label: Ururimi
